records.ety: [D. boer farmer, boor; akin to AS. gebūr countryman, G. bauer; fr. the root of AS. būan to inhabit, and akin to E. bower, be. Cf. Neighbor, Boer, and Big to build.]

defs: A husbandman; a peasant; a rustic; esp. a clownish or unrefined countryman.
A Dutch, German, or Russian peasant; esp. a Dutch colonist in South Africa, Guiana, etc.: a boer.
A rude ill-bred person; one who is clownish in manners.
